channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VKAL] Vantage Knowledge Academy Receives SEBI Warning Letter
item.description:
Vantage Knowledge Academy Ltd. received an administrative warning letter from SEBI regarding clerical errors in the annual report. The company has taken corrective actions and informed the exchange that this event has no material impact on its financial or operational activities. The warning relates to violations of Regulation 34 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations concerning inconsistencies in financial statement presentations for FY 2022-23 to FY 2024-25.

  • SEBI issued an administrative warning letter to Vantage Knowledge Academy.
  • The warning is due to clerical errors and inconsistencies in annual reports.
  • The company states the issue has no material financial impact.
  • Corrective actions have been implemented to prevent future occurrences.
  • The board will review the matter in the upcoming meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vantage Knowledge Academy Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [JARO] Jaro Institute Board to Consider Dividend on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 7, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the declaration of a dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window closure period will end 48 hours after the results are made public on May 9, 2026.

  • Jaro Institute board meeting set for May 7, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Board to consider declaration of dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closes 48 hours after results are public.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IRMENERGY] IRM Energy: Budhram Siyag Resigns as Chief Manager - GA Head
item.description:
IRM Energy Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Budhram Siyag, Chief Manager - GA Head (Banaskantha) and Senior Management Personnel (SMP), effective from the close of business hours on May 04, 2026, due to personal reasons. The company has complied with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations by disclosing the details of the resignation and enclosing the resignation letter.

  • Budhram Siyag resigned as Chief Manager - GA Head (Banaskantha) and SMP.
  • Resignation is effective from May 04, 2026.
  • The reason for resignation is personal.
  • IRM Energy complied with SEBI Listing Regulations for disclosure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRM Energy Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PARAGMILK] Parag Milk Foods Board Meeting on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Parag Milk Foods Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 7, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the financial year, subject to shareholder approval. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 11, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026, to approve FY26 financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 11, 2026, due to insider trading policy.
  • Meeting will cover audited standalone and consolidated results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parag Milk Foods Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ANUHPHR] Anuh Pharma Receives WHO Prequalification for Amodiaquine HCl USP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Anuh Pharma Ltd. has received World Health Organization (WHO) Prequalification (WHO PQ) approval for its Amodiaquine Hydrochloride USP (Amodiaquine HCl USP) active pharmaceutical ingredient (API). This approval allows the company to supply the anti-malarial API to international markets, including WHO-procured and donor-funded programs. Amodiaquine Hydrochloride is an essential medicine used in combination therapies for treating uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria. This prequalification strengthens Anuh Pharma's position as a preferred API supplier for global anti-malarial initiatives.

  • Anuh Pharma gets WHO Prequalification for Amodiaquine Hydrochloride USP.
  • Approval enables supply to WHO-procured and donor-funded programs.
  • Amodiaquine HCl USP is an anti-malarial API used in combination therapies.
  • This approval consolidates Anuh Pharma's position in global anti-malarial programs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ANUH PHARMA LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SUNCITYSY] Suncity Synthetics EGM Approves Resolutions
item.description:
Suncity Synthetics Ltd's Extra-ordinary General Meeting (EGM) was held on April 30, 2026, via video conference. Remote e-voting and e-voting facilities were provided to members. According to the scrutinizer's report, all resolutions outlined in the EGM notice were duly approved by the members with the required majority. Practicing CS Suprabhat Chakraborty was appointed as the scrutinizer for the e-voting process.

  • Suncity Synthetics EGM held on April 30, 2026, via video conference.
  • Remote e-voting and e-voting facilities were available to members.
  • All resolutions in the EGM notice were approved with the required majority.
  • CS Suprabhat Chakraborty was the scrutinizer for the e-voting process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNCITY SYNTHETICS LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [KRISHIVAL] Krishival Foods Revised Monitoring Report for Mar 2026
item.description:
Krishival Foods Ltd. has released a revised monitoring agency report by Brickwork Ratings for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, concerning the utilization of funds from its Rights Issue of Equity Shares. The revision addresses a typographical error in the initial report, specifically regarding the amount utilized, which was incorrectly stated as ₹5.80 crores instead of ₹5.76 crores. The board considered the revised report in its 02/2026-27 meeting. The company raised ₹99.99 Crore through the Rights Issue.

  • Revised monitoring report issued due to a typographical error.
  • Brickwork Ratings is the monitoring agency for the Rights Issue.
  • Funds raised through Rights Issue totaled ₹99.99 Crore.
  • No deviation from the objects of the issue was reported.
  • Revised report available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishival Foods Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [5PAISA] 5paisa Capital Faces ₹33.03 Cr Income Tax Demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

5paisa Capital Ltd has received an order under the Income Tax Act, 1961, resulting in a demand of ₹33,02,51,362. The company received the order on May 4, 2026, and is currently evaluating it. 5paisa Capital believes it has duly discharged all tax liabilities and has adequate grounds to appeal the order. The company does not expect any material impact on its financials or operations.

  • 5paisa Capital received an income tax order demanding ₹33.03 Cr.
  • The order was passed under the Income Tax Act, 1961.
  • The company is evaluating the order and plans to file an appeal.
  • 5paisa Capital believes it has met all tax obligations.
  • The company does not anticipate a material impact on financials.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 5paisa Capital Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [BOMDYEING] Bombay Dyeing: Income Tax Demand of ₹2,26,760
item.description:
Bombay Dyeing & Manufacturing Company Ltd received an assessment order from the Income Tax Department for the assessment year 2023-24, resulting in an enhancement of taxable income by ₹574.35 cr, which was set off against available tax losses. A demand notice of ₹2,26,760 has been raised, and penalty proceedings have been initiated. The enhanced income is due to transfer pricing adjustments and disallowance of deductions.

  • Income Tax Department raised income-tax demand of ₹2,26,760.
  • Taxable income enhanced by ₹574.35 cr due to transfer pricing adjustments.
  • Penalty proceedings have been separately initiated by the income-tax department.
  • The company will take necessary legal actions under the Income Tax Act.
  • Order received on May 4, 2026, via system-generated email.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BOMBAY DYEING & MFG.CO.LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [AFCOM] Afcom Holdings Approves Preliminary Placement Document
item.description:
Afcom Holdings Ltd's board approved and adopted the preliminary placement document dated May 04, 2026, and authorized the opening of the issue on the same date. The board also approved the floor price of ₹799.62 for the issue under SEBI ICDR Regulations. The 'relevant date' for the issue is May 4, 2026, and a discount of not more than 5% on the floor price may be offered. The trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours after the determination of the issue price.

  • Afcom Holdings approved preliminary placement document on May 4, 2026.
  • Issue opens May 4, 2026, with a floor price of ₹799.62.
  • A discount of up to 5% on the floor price may be offered.
  • Trading window closed for designated persons until issue price determination.
  • Issue price will be determined in consultation with book running lead managers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Afcom Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
